title: Internal Error: ../V3AstNodeDType.h:1177: Typedef not linked
body:
```
%Error: Internal Error: test.sv:428:12: ../V3AstNodeDType.h:1177: Typedef not linked
  428 |    typedef m_object_registry#(l_smoke_test_gen,"l_smoke_test_gen") type_id; 
      |            ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)



What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

`verilator -Wno-LATCH -DUVM_NO_DPI -Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-CONSTRAINTIGN -Wno-ZERODLY -Wno-SYMRSVDWORD --cc --exe -sv --assert --trace-fst --trace-params --trace-structs --report-unoptflat --no-timing --timescale 1ps/1ps --x-assign unique --unroll-count 256 --error-limit 9999 --inline-mult 100000 --output-split 200000 --output-split-cfuncs 5000 --output-split-ctrace 4000 --threads 1 -fno-const-bit-op-tree -fno-dfg-peephole --top-module top test.sv sim_main.cpp`

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

`Verilator 5.029 devel rev v5.028-201-ga3d0cc652`

What OS and distribution are you using?

`Linux 5.14.0-427.33.1.el9_4.x86_64`

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
